name: wlr-which-key
title: wlr-which-key
description: Navigate your wlr-which-key keymap menu inside Vicinae
author: lucas

commands.name: which-key
commands.title: Which Key
commands.description: Open the wlr-which-key menu and drill into submenus

preferences.name: configPath
preferences.title: Config Path
preferences.description: Path to wlr-which-key config.yaml. Defaults to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/wlr-which-key/config.yaml

preferences.name: defaultKeys
preferences.title: Default Keys
preferences.description: Key path to navigate to on launch when no keys argument is given (e.g. p s)
